title.zh: 中医养眼：让眼睛明亮有神的秘诀
title.en: TCM Eye Care: Secrets for Bright, Spirited Eyes

description.zh: 掌握中医养眼的方法，从调理肝肾入手，让眼睛明亮有神，告别眼部问题
description.en: Master TCM eye care methods, regulate liver-kidney for bright eyes

zh.text: 眼睛是心灵的窗户，也是容貌的重要组成部分。中医认为"肝开窍于目"，眼睛的健康与肝肾功能密切相关。想要眼睛明亮有神，必须从调理肝肾入手。

items: 肝开窍于目
肝血充足则眼睛明亮
肝血不足则眼睛干涩
肝火旺盛则眼睛红肿
肾精充足则眼神明亮
肾精不足则眼神黯淡
肾虚则眼睛干涩疲劳
肾气不足则视力下降
原因：肝肾阴虚，泪液分泌不足
表现：眼睛干涩、异物感
调理：滋阴润燥，补肝肾
原因：用眼过度，气血不足
表现：眼睛酸胀、视物模糊
调理：补气养血，适度休息
原因：肾虚、气血不足、熬夜
表现：眼周皮肤暗沉
调理：补肾养血，规律作息
枸杞：滋补肝肾，明目养眼
菊花：清肝明目，清热解毒
决明子：清肝明目，润肠通便
桑叶：清肝明目，疏散风热
蓝莓：养肝明目，抗氧化
黑芝麻：补肝肾，明目
核桃：补肾健脑，养眼
桑葚：滋阴补血，明目
黑豆：补肾益精，养眼
睛明穴：眼内角，明目要穴
攒竹穴：眉头内侧，缓解眼疲劳
太阳穴：眼外侧，促进眼部气血
四白穴：眼下方，明目养眼
丝竹空穴：眼外侧，缓解眼疲劳
用指腹按揉睛明穴
用拇指按揉攒竹穴
用中指按揉太阳穴
用指腹轻压眼周
闭眼转动眼球
每日按摩5分钟

zh.title: 枸杞菊花明目茶
zh.instructions:
1. 所有材料洗净
2. 加水煮沸
3. 转小火煮10分钟
4. 代茶饮用
5. 每日1次
6. 清肝明目，养眼护眼

items: 规律作息：保证充足睡眠
补肾养血：多吃黑色食物
眼部按摩：促进眼周气血
避免熬夜：减少眼部负担
热敷眼部：促进血液循环
适度用眼：避免长时间看屏幕
定时休息：每小时休息5分钟
远眺放松：眺望远方缓解疲劳
保持湿度：避免干燥环境
营养均衡：多吃养眼食物

zh.text: 温馨提示：养眼需要长期坚持。严重眼部问题建议在中医师指导下进行综合调理。如有视力下降等问题，请及时就医检查。

en.text: Eyes are the window to the soul and an important part of appearance. TCM believes "Liver opens into eyes" - eye health is closely related to liver-kidney function. For bright, spirited eyes, start with regulating liver and kidney.

items: Liver opens into eyes
Sufficient liver blood gives bright eyes
Liver blood deficiency causes dry eyes
Excess liver fire causes red, swollen eyes
Sufficient kidney essence gives bright spirit in eyes
Kidney essence deficiency causes dull eyes
Kidney deficiency causes dry, tired eyes
Kidney Qi deficiency causes vision decline
Cause: Liver-kidney Yin deficiency, insufficient tear secretion
Signs: Dry eyes, foreign body sensation
Treatment: Nourish Yin, moisten dryness, tonify liver-kidney
Cause: Overuse of eyes, Qi-Blood deficiency
Signs: Sore, swollen eyes, blurred vision
Treatment: Tonify Qi-Blood, moderate rest
Cause: Kidney deficiency, Qi-Blood deficiency, late nights
Signs: Dark skin around eyes
Treatment: Tonify kidney, nourish blood, regular routine
Goji berries: Nourishes liver-kidney, brightens eyes
Chrysanthemum: Clears liver, brightens eyes
Cassia seeds: Clears liver, brightens eyes
Mulberry leaf: Clears liver, brightens eyes
Blueberries: Nourish liver, brighten eyes, antioxidant
Black sesame: Tonifies liver-kidney, brightens eyes
Walnut: Tonifies kidney, nourishes brain and eyes
Mulberry: Nourishes Yin, tonifies blood, brightens eyes
Black beans: Tonify kidney, benefit essence, nourish eyes
Jingming: Inner eye corner, key point for brightening eyes
Cuanzhu: Inner eyebrow, relieves eye fatigue
Taiyang: Outer eye, promotes eye Qi-Blood
Sibai: Below eye, brightens eyes
Sizhukong: Outer eye, relieves fatigue
Massage Jingming with fingertips
Press Cuanzhu with thumb
Press Taiyang with middle finger
Lightly press around eyes with fingertips
Close eyes, rotate eyeballs
Massage 5 minutes daily

en.title: Goji Chrysanthemum Bright-Eyes Tea
en.instructions:
1. Wash all ingredients
2. Boil water
3. Simmer for 10 minutes
4. Drink as tea
5. Once daily
6. Clears liver, brightens eyes, protects eyes

items: Regular routine: Ensure sufficient sleep
Tonify kidney, nourish blood: Eat more black foods
Eye massage: Promotes Qi-Blood around eyes
Avoid late nights: Reduce eye burden
Warm compress: Promotes blood circulation
Moderate eye use: Avoid long screen time
Regular breaks: Rest 5 minutes every hour
Look far away: Distant viewing relieves fatigue
Maintain humidity: Avoid dry environments
Balanced nutrition: Eat more eye-nourishing foods

en.text: Note: Eye care requires long-term commitment. Severe eye problems should be treated comprehensively under TCM practitioner guidance. Seek medical examination for vision decline.
